description_long: This is a pair of fingerless gloves featuring a striking digital pixelated pattern in shades of red, black, and white. The gloves are designed to cover the palm and back of the hand while leaving the fingers exposed for dexterity. The material appears to be a flexible, soft fabric, likely synthetic, with a snug fit around the wrist and hand. The pixelated design gives the gloves a modern, urban aesthetic, suitable for activities such as cycling, weightlifting, or streetwear fashion. The gloves do not have any visible closure mechanisms, suggesting a slip-on style. No visible branding or logos are present, and the gloves have a matte, slightly grippy finish.
description: A pair of fingerless gloves with a bold red, black, and white pixelated pattern, made from soft, flexible fabric and designed for a snug, slip-on fit.
description_view_0: Front and back of the gloves are visible, showing the pixelated pattern and fingerless design.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the glove openings and the snug wrist fit.
description_view_2: Opposite front and back view, emphasizing the fingerless tips and the digital pattern.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite angle, showing the glove's length and open finger sections.
